message:
test(engine): add integration test suites for ESM loader, performance
regression gate, statistical validation, tier-up profiler, and expand
bytecode VM, CI quality gates, and module resolution parity tests

New integration test files:
- esm_loader_integration.rs (1020 lines): end-to-end ESM loading
  pipeline tests covering resolve → fetch → parse → link → evaluate,
  cycle detection, bare-specifier mapping, cache invalidation, and
  deterministic module graph ordering
- performance_regression_gate_integration.rs (752 lines): regression
  gate verdict tests with threshold boundary cases, culprit ranking
  determinism, waiver expiry enforcement, and fail-closed semantics
- performance_statistical_validation_integration.rs (918 lines):
  statistical validation pipeline tests for variance guardrails,
  confidence intervals, and noisy-data rejection
- rgc_performance_regression_gate.rs (146 lines): RGC-703 gate
  integration tests for promotion/rejection scenarios
- tier_up_profiler_integration.rs (651 lines): tier-up profiler
  end-to-end tests covering hot-path identification, candidate
  selection, and evidence artifact generation

Updated test files:
- bytecode_vm.rs (+1508 lines): expanded VM instruction coverage,
  execution trace validation, and inline cache statistics tests
- rgc_ci_quality_gates.rs (+32 lines): additional quality gate
  scenarios and fixture data updates
- rgc_ci_quality_gates_v1.json (+9 lines): new fixture entries
- test_logging_schema_integration.rs (+12 lines): structured logging
  schema validation extensions
- ts_module_resolution_parity.rs (+22 lines): TypeScript module
  resolution parity expansion
- parser_third_party_rerun_kit.rs (+5 lines): rerun kit additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
